So for best efficiency cost wise, you try to focus on a banner youu want a limited for as more limited units were added to the standard banner. Before it times out the you invest on the unit you had gotten mos copies off and you wont be using, I would not suggest using it on nymph as she is really good for poison comps.

But for the more weaker or niche units that can be usable but just not effectively. good examples are like pandia and alva where they can remove counter andn symptons, but arent reallly that reliable or atleast you wont be punsihed too hard if you dont need em
that being said it is up to you what you deemed more unreliable at the time

if you feel as nymphh really doesnt fit into your team (even tho most piison teams are very budget friendly) you can do that right before the time of origin times out incase you end up getting any more nynphae copies
ahh so you can use the selectors on the newly added units to the pool like 24?
